---
title: "MSP input Belgium"
autogen: true
format:
  html:
    grid:
      sidebar-width: 250px
      body-width: 1500px
      margin-width: 0px
      gutter-width: 1.5rem
---

Info on MSP experts MSP input for Belgium

::: {layout="[ [1,1] ]"}

```{=html}
<iframe style="border:none;" height="800" width="100%" src="https://testsysteemrapportage.nl/compendium-greater-north-sea/MSP2030.html#be-msp-2030"></iframe>
```

```{=html}
<iframe style="border:none;" height="800" width="100%" src="https://viewer.openearth.nl/compendium-greater-north-sea-embedded/?folders=144094709,146388827&layers=146388968,146388947,146388931,146388887&layerNames=Aquaculture%20zones%20in%20the%20Belgian%20Part%20of%20the%20North%20Sea%20%28Geo.be,%202019%29,Commercial%20and%20industrial%20zones%20in%20the%20Belgian%20Part%20of%20the%20North%20Sea%20%28Geo.be,%202019%29,Energy,%20cable%20and%20pipeline%20zones%20in%20the%20Belgian%20Part%20of%20the%20North%20Sea%20%28Geo.be,%202019%29,Management%20zones%20with%20regards%20to%20fisheries%20in%20the%20Belgian%20Part%20of%20the%20North%20Sea%20%28Geo.be,%202019%29"></iframe>
```

:::
